Game: The Adventures of Dr. Franken 1993-12-01T00:00:00-08:00 Franky and his girlfriend Bitsy have decided to take a vacation. Unfortunately, Bitsy does not have a passport. Not to be thwarted, our spare parts hero has a cunning plan. He dismantles Bitsy, packages up her pads and mails them to their vacation destination - New York City - with predictable results. The combination of Franky's lack of brain cells and the incompetence of the Transylvanian post office has scattered Bitsy across the globe. And so, the adventure begins... 1 g1pawhw3wGM http://images.launchbox-app.com/7ea8aa6e-14aa-48a7-8a81-08d5f14b27b1.jpg <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/8103273b-6c45-4bba-8a04-1cadccba4754.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/fc22b88d-1eff-456f-93cc-d0c2d810c215.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/37e86de5-6f9b-428a-b7fc-2bfda39c59b4.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/f32bae99-263d-4143-af5d-b3b182dd1ed5.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/cd79f160-986b-4aec-ae45-0c26e36f356a.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/7936d89b-8860-48b1-acd6-76ec6d644b8e.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/3780c438-7670-492f-b054-660fdba8e371.png 4 Not Rated Adventure Elite Systems Kemco, DTMC
